title: Simple Hotbar Swapper
description: Player can swap items fast from the inventory to the hotbar.
body:
Simple Hotbar Swapper is a client only mod, that allows the player to swap items fast from the inventory to the hotbar.

 ![item swap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CqnVmHKP/images/c8728c71657edcfaec0fa7eb450f80a048cc9720.gif)

 

There are 4 key bind options available right now.

    -swap 9 items (forward and backward) (ALT and Z)

    -swap only the selected 1 item (forward and backward) (V and B)

 

Key bindings can be changed in the Options->Control->Key binds...

 

PS:

If possible, use a mod additionally that lets you have more key binding options like Amecs

 

Mod Currently Supports

**Forge 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**
